title: Package Read-Only Generated Adapter
goal: Implement #362 by extending generated adapter migration beyond the root workspace command and wiring one package read-only command through generated metadata.
non_goals: Generate all planning or memory commands.
Merge package commands into the root front door.
Move package runtime primitive behavior into generated metadata.

intent.outcome: Planning and memory command surfaces have a clear migration path, and planning `status` is the first package read-only generated adapter slice.
intent.constraints: Stay on master; keep runtime implementation package-local and hand-written; avoid root-command-only generator assumptions.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest generator/output shape that supports multiple programs.
intent.escalation: Stop before broad package command generation or lifecycle mutation commands.

execution.next_step: Archive this slice and continue with #363 multi-adapter projection requirements.
execution.proof: Use proof --changed, generator freshness, contract tooling, planning package tests, workspace tests, ruff, planning checks, reconcile, summary.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Generated shipped CLI adapters from authoritative package definitions.

required_continuation.activation trigger: After one package read-only adapter is generated, define multi-adapter projection requirements.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Extend generated adapter migration to planning and memory package command surfaces.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Generate only one read-only package command now; keep package-local runtime primitive ownership.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Use planning status as the first package adapter and record memory expansion as remaining continuation.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The change requires broad package CLI generation or lifecycle mutation adapters.

immediate_next_action: Close and archive #362 after final proof.
validation_commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests tests/test_contract_tooling.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py
uv run ruff check src tests scripts packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests
completion_criteria: Planning and memory command surfaces have a migration path recorded in the command adapter contract.
Generated output checks are not root-command-only.
No active execplan remains after archive closeout.

execution_run.what happened: Generalized generated command adapter outputs by program, generated planning package adapter metadata, routed planning status through generated metadata, and recorded memory status as the next package surface.
execution_run.validations run: proof --changed; generator freshness; contract tooling; generated conformance tests; planning package tests; workspace CLI tests; ruff; planning surface check; reconcile; summary.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Generated planning package `status` adapter metadata and routed planning status dispatch through it; memory status migration path was recorded for the next package surface.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Proof-selected planning package, workspace CLI, contract tooling, generator freshness, conformance, ruff, planning checks, reconcile, and summary checks passed.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed; `command_adapter_generation.json` now carries the package migration path.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json selected planning package, workspace CLI, contract tooling, generator freshness, conformance, ruff, planning-surface, reconcile, and summary checks.
proof_report.proof achieved now: Planning status dispatches through generated metadata; generator freshness, contract tooling, conformance, planning package tests, workspace CLI tests, lint, planning checks, reconcile, and summary passed.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Generated package adapter file, planning CLI dispatch through generated metadata, command_adapter_generation package migration path, operation and conformance contract entries, focused and proof-selected validation commands.

discard.summary: No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed for local execution detail.

continuation.summary: #363 remains open for multi-adapter projection requirements after the first package adapter slice.

memory.summary: No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed; `command_adapter_generation.json` now carries the package migration path.

config_check.summary: No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed; `command_adapter_generation.json` now carries the package migration path.

docs.summary: No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed; `command_adapter_generation.json` now carries the package migration path.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Extend generated adapter migration to planning and memory package command surfaces.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #362 generated planning status adapter metadata and dispatch, and recorded memory status migration path

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #362 delivered one package read-only adapter; parent #356 still needs multi-adapter projection requirements.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen #362 if planning package status cannot be maintained through generated adapter metadata or memory no longer has a recorded package migration path.
